title: Building Resumator
description: Build a full-stack job search application with Spring Boot, JSearch API, and MySQL

lessons.description: Plan the architecture and set up the Spring Boot project

lessons.description: Connect to JSearch API and build the search endpoint

lessons.description: Create the frontend search page with job cards

lessons.description: Build favorites, encounter a real error, and fix it

lessons.title: Completing Resumator
lessons.description: Build the favorites page and polish the application

lessons.title: Tracking API Usage with Thymeleaf
lessons.description: Add Thymeleaf templates, API request tracking, and quota enforcement

lessons.title: Search Features & Security Basics
lessons.description: Build local search, learn SQL injection prevention, and security fundamentals

lessons.title: Review, Reflect & What's Next
lessons.description: Celebrate your journey and plan what comes next
